s1.account: Account Data: Email address, company name, contact name, hashed password. We never store plain-text passwords.
s1.wallets: Wallet Addresses: Public wallet addresses you provide. For managed wallets, we also store encrypted private keys (AES-256).
s1.tx: Transaction Data: Order amounts, blockchain transaction hashes, chain, token type, timestamps, payment status.
s1.chat: Chat History: Conversations with the AI assistant are stored to provide continuity and personalized support.
s1.usage: Usage Data: IP addresses (for rate limiting), feature usage patterns.

s2.l1: Private keys for non-managed wallets (we never have access)
s2.l2: Customer (payer) personal data beyond optional email

s3.l3: Send verification emails and payment notifications
s3.l5: Prevent fraud and enforce rate limits

s4.p: Data is stored on Railway (PostgreSQL) and served via Vercel. All connections use TLS encryption. Managed wallet private keys are encrypted at rest with AES-256. Database backups are automated by the hosting provider.

s5.resend: Resend: Email delivery (verification codes, invoices, receipts)
s5.anthropic: Anthropic (Claude): AI assistant — your chat messages are sent to Anthropic's API for processing
s5.rpc: Blockchain RPCs: Public blockchain nodes for payment detection (no personal data sent)

s6.p: Account data: retained while account is active + 90 days after deletion. Transaction records: retained for 7 years (financial compliance). Chat history: retained while account is active, deletable by user. You can request full data export or deletion by contacting us.

s7.l5: Withdraw managed wallet funds at any time

s8.p: We use: HTTPS everywhere, bcrypt password hashing (12 rounds), AES-256 encryption for managed wallet keys, Bearer token authentication, rate limiting on all endpoints. We follow OWASP security best practices.

s9.p: We use sessionStorage (not cookies) for authentication. No tracking cookies, no analytics cookies, no third-party cookies.

s10.p: We'll notify you via email of material changes to this policy. Minor changes are posted here with an updated date.
